]ZZ	e
^\s*(vir\w+)\s*;\s*$T
\*(virDrv\w+)\s*\))

(\*vir\w+)\s*\)z

^\s*(virDrv\w+)\s+(\w+);\s*
NWFilterZ
nwfilter
z)Driver struct field %s should be named %s)
